prompt: Order these energy milestones from earliest to latest

events.title: Pearl Street Station (power)
events.fact: 1882 — Edison opens first commercial US power plant

events.title: Chicago Pile-1 (reactor)
events.fact: 1942 — Fermi achieves first self-sustaining nuclear reaction

events.title: Obninsk grid connected
events.fact: 1954 — first nuclear power station to generate grid power

events.title: Three Mile Island accident
events.fact: 1979 — partial meltdown of reactor in Pennsylvania

events.title: Net energy gain in fusion
events.fact: 2022 — NIF achieves ignition (more energy out than in)
